workflow.title: Works with the tools that keep delivery moving.
workflow.body: The public page is only the visible layer. The useful part is the operating model behind it: routes, dashboard, data, observability, and proof that can be reviewed.

proof.title: Proof without exposing private work.
proof.body: Every public claim points back to visible pages, sanitized media, or a system boundary that protects client data.

contactForm.formIntro: A polished brief is not required. Share the goal, who it should serve, what you want to make possible, and the best way to reach you. I will reply personally with a practical next step.
contactForm.preferredContactHelp: Email is required to confirm your request. Choose WhatsApp and add your phone number when you want the reply there.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to create, improve, or launch? Who should it help, and what matters most right now?
contactForm.consentLabel: I understand AOHYS will use this information to respond to my request.
contactForm.successMessage: Message sent. I will reply through the contact path you selected.
contactForm.degradedSuccessMessage: Message saved. I can see it in the dashboard even if the email notification is delayed.
contactForm.errorMessage: The form could not send right now. Use WhatsApp or email directly.
contactForm.validationMessage: Please review the highlighted fields before retrying.
contactForm.rateLimitedMessage: That request was received too recently. Please wait a few minutes before sending another.
contactForm.emailErrorMessage: The notification email could not be sent.
contactForm.backendErrorMessage: The contact backend is temporarily unavailable.
contactForm.endpointMissing: Contact endpoint is not configured for this environment.
contactForm.retryLabel: Try again, or use WhatsApp or email directly.
